\tzpentry{ID3350}{Electron Neural Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3350 introduces Electron Neural Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_{ \text{electron-neural}} = -J_{ \text{ex}} \sum_{ \langle i,j \rangle} \mathbf{S}_i \cdot \mathbf{S}_j + g \mu_B \sum_i \mathbf{B}_{ \text{neural}}[i] \cdot \mathbf{S}_i \end{equation}
